nasb.text: The men in ambush rose quickly from their place, and when he had stretched out his hand, they ran and entered the city and captured it, and they quickly set the city on fire.

esv.text: And the men in the ambush rose quickly out of their place, and as soon as he had stretched out his hand, they ran and entered the city and captured it. And they hurried to set the city on fire.

cnv.text: 他一伸手，伏兵就從埋伏的地方急忙起來，衝進城去，把城奪取，並連忙放火燒城。

ccb.text: 他一伸手，城后的伏兵立即行动，迅速冲进城去，一举占领艾城，并放火烧城。
